description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

A sounding-type market survey was conducted to gather input for the privatization of Sengan Childcare Center as part of its rebuilding.

This survey sought opinions and proposals from private operators regarding facility construction and operations on municipal land at the rebuilding candidate site, in place of the current Sengan Childcare Center.

【Schedule (Concluded)】
• Entry sheet submission period: November 19, 2025 (Wednesday) to December 5, 2025 (Friday)
• Advance question submission period: November 19, 2025 (Wednesday) to December 5, 2025 (Friday)

The results were made public on February 18, 2026 (Reiwa 8).

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kodomoshienbu/kodomoseisakuka/12596.html
summary: ℹ️ 【Concluded】Sounding-type market survey for municipal childcare facilities
